title: Example Snakemake Report
author: Meesters, Christian
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This is an example report for the Snakemake analysis workflow to analyse differential gene expression and isoform splicing analysis on Nanopore long-read RNA-Seq data using  minimap2 ,  Salmon , and  DESeq2  : https://github.com/snakemake-workflows/rna-longseq-de-isoform/
